module.name: no-explicit-any
module.description: Disallow explicit any; model unknown values precisely and narrow them explicitly.

scenarios.name: should allow unknown annotations
scenarios.given: code that annotates a value as unknown
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type annotation

scenarios.name: should disallow any in function parameters
scenarios.given: a function parameter annotated as any
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the TSAnyKeyword node

scenarios.name: should disallow any in generic type arguments
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the TSAnyKeyword node
